summary: Validated P0 fix: /mood-chat route is now registered before /:slug catch-all in App.js. Full end-to-end frontend testing of MoodChat flow completed successfully.

test_results.direct_navigation_to_mood_chat: PASS - /mood-chat renders MoodChat page with data-testid='mood-chat-page', header 'Mood-Based Chat', input and send button visible.
test_results.landing_cta_navigation: PASS - Clicking [data-testid='cta-mood-chat'] from landing navigates to /mood-chat and renders MoodChat page.
test_results.send_message_round_trip: PASS - POST /api/clones/companion/chat returned status 200 with reply, mood_ui (theme/dominant_state/confidence), and conversation_id. Companion bubble correctly appended to chat.
test_results.info_modal_opens: PASS - Clicking [data-testid='info-icon-mood-chat-header'] opens ChatInfoModal with 'How Mood-Based Chat works' content.
test_results.slug_regression_publicclone: PASS - Visiting /companion still renders PublicClone (AI clone disclaimer banner visible), NOT MoodChat. Catch-all /:slug works correctly.
test_results.ai_clone_chat_cta_unaffected: PASS - [data-testid='cta-clone-chat'] from landing navigates to /explore as expected.

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in /app/frontend/src/App.js is correct: /mood-chat is placed at line 32, before /:slug at line 37. No issues.
test_credentials: Not required - Mood-Based Chat is public/visitor-based.
seed_data_creation: None - 'companion' clone is auto-seeded by backend and available.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 route-ordering fix verified end-to-end. /mood-chat works for direct nav and landing CTA. POST /api/clones/companion/chat returns valid {reply, mood_ui, conversation_id} via Claude Sonnet 4.5. /:slug regression intact for public clones (verified with /companion still hitting PublicClone disclaimer view). ChatInfoModal opens with mood content. No regressions found.
